subject: Mathematics
style: Uganda flag-inspired classroom infographic; exact SVG text overlay; no generated text inside raster image.
title: 4.0 Patterns and Sequences (Final Review)
details: Draw a Venn diagram of the inventory.
evidence_excerpts: Concrete Stage: Organizing market items into sets and subsets using stones and sticks. The learner forms subsets and represents information using concrete objects from the local environment. Use stones to represent customers.; Group local items into Sets.; Identify subsets within the market.

Pictorial Stage: Drawing Venn diagrams for market sets and creating price sequences. The learner represents information on Venn diagrams and identifies number patterns in a sequence. Draw a Venn diagram of the inventory.; Create a price sequence for items.; Identify the rule of the sequence.

Abstract Stage: Calculating total market revenue and expressing large figures in scientific notation. The learner applies the four basic operations to whole numbers and writes numbers in standard form. Multiply items by price.; Sum the total revenue.; Convert large totals to Standard Form.
